patterns.interpretation: Lifted experiments averaged evidence quality 8.0/10 vs 5.0/10 for no-lift.
Lifted experiments averaged hypothesis quality 8.33/10 vs 6.5/10 for no-lift.
Shipped winners tended to cite cart/PDP/collection artifacts; no-lift cases often had homepage-level or unverified widget claims.

suggested_rubric_updates.proposed_change: [low confidence — review before applying] Tighten 9–10 band: require artifact path naming a specific surface (cart.md, pdp_1.md, collection.md) — not homepage-only mentions. Downgrade to <=5 when evidence is site-wide copy without surface proof.
suggested_rubric_updates.trigger: Lifted avg evidence 8.0 vs no-lift avg 5.0

suggested_rubric_updates.proposed_change: [low confidence — review before applying] Add rule: experiments citing only homepage.md for PDP-specific UI changes should cap evidence_quality at 6 until PDP artifact confirms.
suggested_rubric_updates.trigger: Shipped winners tended to cite cart/PDP/collection artifacts; no-lift cases often had homepage-level or unverified widget claims.

suggested_rubric_updates.proposed_change: [low confidence — review before applying] When hypothesis names a UI element placement (e.g. 'reviews above ATC'), require crawl evidence of current placement — falsifiable claim needs observed baseline.

[low confidence — review before applying] No outcome-based change yet — insufficient shipped count to correlate decision rule wording with lift. Keep structural eval numeric check; re-run calibration after more merchants report back.
suggested_rubric_updates.trigger: Insufficient data for decision-rule vs outcome correlation

limitations: Only 6 shipped experiments across 2 store(s). Need >=20 shipped experiments for reliable signal.
Only 2 store(s) with outcome data. Need >=5 stores before cross-merchant rubric changes.
